title: The Human-AI Teammate Interaction Loop
description: A flowchart illustrating the collaborative feedback loop between a human operator and a tele-operated robot (tele-bot) in a shared environment.
relationships: Human gives high-level goals and monitors via sensor feedback
AI translates goals into safe, efficient actions for the tele-bot and provides context
Tele-bot executes actions and collects environmental sensor data
Sensor data and task status are fed back to the human operator to close the loop
